creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
> review package message direction to emulation@

Specifically, <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/afbf09cc33941f6e8015ea2a99665add0df3b03a#diff-64c4a683499abbf4275fc526621380d5ffa8c2f6c58cd5a2acf0080b6d47f377R17>: 

>> Please report any problems to emulation@. Thanks!


Found today, <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/commit/afbf09cc33941f6e8015ea2a99665add0df3b03a#diff-7d9be5932e9895f0f72c02cfc545ee5efeb19ab108833940a45be6500cc1d481R19>: 

>> #for discussion please use emulation@FreeBSD.org
– that's equally clear. 


Whilst VirtualBox _is_ a virtualisation product <https://www.virtualbox.org/#WelcometoVirtualBox.org>, I was wrong to assume freebsd-virtualization@
